metadata.archetype: A2 (anchor == subject; name carries precision, null target)
metadata.notes: Single standalone atomic. Bare 'Myanmar' is ~95% on-topic (only ~22/470 noise: quakes, cyclone, a ruby). No ASIA-MYANMAR centroid exists, so the name IS the gate. Per A2: name + translations + a few unambiguous own-side proper nouns; NO generic domain verbs (they'd leak across the shared SE/SASIA/CHINA centroid to Cambodia/Thailand/regional news). 'Burma' needs per-language forms (Birma/Birmania/Birmanie); 'Myanmar' is identical across Latin scripts so EN-only. zh 缅甸 collides with nothing here; ja ミャンマー is the standard katakana.
